name: design-system
tagline: Defines a three-layer design-token architecture (primitive/semantic/component) and drives strategic HTML slide generation from CSV decision.
verdict: Compact, well-structured SKILL.md with consistent naming and a clean reference-file split. It never states what to do if its node/python scripts, the Pexels/Unsplash background fetch, or validation fail, gives no negative triggers despite explicit overlap with sibling skills (brand, ui-styling, design), and never declares node/python as prerequisites.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion text anywhere, despite an explicit 'Skill Dependencies: brand, ui-styling' overlap with sibling skills.
No failure handling anywhere for token script execution, the Pexels/Unsplash image fetch, or slide-token-validator.py failing.
Invokes node (generate-tokens.cjs, validate-tokens.cjs) and python (search-slides.py, fetch-background.py) with no requirements section or availability check.
